title: AdminShop
description:
Note: as of version 2.0 onwards, this mod requires FTB Teams

A powerful, fully customizable shop for modpack developers and server admins. Buy and sell items and fluids, fully automate buying and selling, create shared co-op accounts.
body:
Visit our discord for frequent updates: https://discord.gg/hEaS5EVCH7

This mod is in early development: bugs and crashes may occur. If you encounter these, report them in the mod's GitHub https://github.com/AmmoniumX/AdminShop

AdminShop is a powerful mod that allows both server administrator and modpack developers to add their fully customizable "shop" into Minecraft, where players can buy and sell items at fixed prices. 

The features of AdminShop include:
- Ability to buy and sell fluids and items, with NBT support.
- Fully customizable list of buyable and sellable fluids/items through an editable spreadsheet file.
- Ability to lock specific buying and selling offers behind unlockable "trade permits".
- Automate said buying and selling through auto-buyers and sellers.
- A custom "bank account" system, in which you can either play by yourself, or create shared accounts with other players, allowing Co-Op play in servers.
- Fully functional even while the player is offline, if the chunks are still loaded.
- Control automation with redstone emitting "balance detectors".
- Built-in Patchouli guide.

The mod was originally for 1.12 by Vnator, but it has been forked to newer versions and overhauled by Ammonium.

For more information, such as a setup guide for modpack developers and server admins, please visit https://github.com/AmmoniumX/AdminShop
